dipole-freesp-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole, free space, 51 segments, 14.2 MHz
dipole-freesp-51seg.status: Reference captured from Python study; xnec2c validation TBD

dipole-ex3-freesp-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole (z-oriented), 51 seg, 14.2 MHz, EX type 3 (left-elliptic) incident plane wave. PH8-CHK-002: solves on --solver hallen (receive solve, no feedpoint). On a z-wire the elliptic polarization reduces to linear; --ex3-i4-mode is an obsolete no-op. Validated by crates/nec_solver/tests/planewave_nec2c.rs.
dipole-ex3-freesp-51seg.reference_source: nec_solver planewave tests (elliptic reduction + tilted-wire nec2c shape); receive solve has no feedpoint
dipole-ex3-freesp-51seg.status: PH8-CHK-002: EX type 3 (left-elliptic) plane wave solves; skipped in the impedance-centric corpus framework (receive-only).

dipole-ex3-divide-by-i4-freesp-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole (z-oriented), 51 seg, 14.2 MHz, EX type 3 (left-elliptic) incident plane wave. PH8-CHK-002: solves on --solver hallen (receive solve, no feedpoint). On a z-wire the elliptic polarization reduces to linear; --ex3-i4-mode is an obsolete no-op. Validated by crates/nec_solver/tests/planewave_nec2c.rs.
dipole-ex3-divide-by-i4-freesp-51seg.reference_source: nec_solver planewave tests (elliptic reduction + tilted-wire nec2c shape); receive solve has no feedpoint
dipole-ex3-divide-by-i4-freesp-51seg.status: PH8-CHK-002: EX type 3 (left-elliptic) plane wave solves; skipped in the impedance-centric corpus framework (receive-only).

dipole-ex1-freesp-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole, free space, 51 segments, 14.2 MHz, EX type 1 incident plane wave (receiving antenna). NEC2 type 1 = linear plane wave; this deck now SOLVES on --solver hallen (no feedpoint impedance for a receive solve). The induced-current physics is validated by crates/nec_solver/tests/planewave_nec2c.rs (nec2c shape parity + Rayleigh-Carson reciprocity) and the CLI accept-path by apps/nec-cli/tests/ex_cards.rs. This corpus case is skipped here because the reference framework is impedance/feedpoint-centric and does not model a receive-only (no-feedpoint) case.
dipole-ex1-freesp-51seg.reference_source: nec_solver planewave tests + ex_cards CLI accept-path (see description)
dipole-ex1-freesp-51seg.status: PH8-CHK-002: EX type 1 = incident plane wave; solves via the plane-wave path. Validated outside the impedance-centric corpus framework (see description).

dipole-ex1-pulse-current-freesp-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole, free space, 51 segments, 14.2 MHz, EX type 1 (incident plane wave) requested on the pulse solver path. NEC2 plane waves solve only on --solver hallen, so pulse fails fast with an actionable error.
dipole-ex1-pulse-current-freesp-51seg.reference_source: fnec fail-fast: plane wave requires --solver hallen
forbidden_warning_substrings: EX type 1 is currently treated like EX type 0
dipole-ex1-pulse-current-freesp-51seg.status: PH8-CHK-002: EX type 1 = incident plane wave; --solver pulse fails fast (plane wave requires --solver hallen).

dipole-ex2-freesp-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole (z-oriented), 51 seg, 14.2 MHz, EX type 2 (right-elliptic) incident plane wave. PH8-CHK-002: solves on --solver hallen (receive solve, no feedpoint). On a z-wire the elliptic polarization reduces to linear; --ex3-i4-mode is an obsolete no-op. Validated by crates/nec_solver/tests/planewave_nec2c.rs.
dipole-ex2-freesp-51seg.reference_source: nec_solver planewave tests (elliptic reduction + tilted-wire nec2c shape); receive solve has no feedpoint
dipole-ex2-freesp-51seg.status: PH8-CHK-002: EX type 2 (right-elliptic) plane wave solves; skipped in the impedance-centric corpus framework (receive-only).

dipole-ex4-freesp-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole, free space, 51 segments, 14.2 MHz, EX type 4 current source (i0=1 A at the center). PH8-CHK-001: solves on --solver hallen; the current-source feedpoint impedance Z=V/i0 equals the voltage-source dipole impedance (74.23+j13.9), which is exactly the internal consistency the current-source path is validated against.
dipole-ex4-freesp-51seg.reference_source: fnec Hallen current-source solve; Z = V_port / i0 (equals the voltage-source dipole impedance)
dipole-ex4-freesp-51seg.status: PH8-CHK-001: EX type 4 = current source; solves on --solver hallen with feedpoint Z=V/i0 matching the voltage-source dipole.

dipole-ex4-pulse-current-freesp-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole, free space, 51 segments, 14.2 MHz, EX type 4 source on the pulse solver path with the first implemented segment-current semantics slice.
dipole-ex4-pulse-current-freesp-51seg.reference_source: fnec pulse solver EX4 segment-current implementation (regression)
forbidden_warning_substrings: EX type 4 is currently treated like EX type 0
dipole-ex4-pulse-current-freesp-51seg.status: PH8-CHK-001: EX type 4 = current source; --solver pulse fails fast (current source requires --solver hallen).

dipole-ex5-freesp-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole, free space, 51 seg, 14.2 MHz, EX type 5 (voltage source, current-slope discontinuity). PH8-CHK-003: fnec models type 5 as a voltage source via the applied-field method, giving the same result as type 0 (NEC's separate current-slope numerics, ~6% different, are not modelled).
dipole-ex5-freesp-51seg.reference_source: fnec Hallen voltage-source solve (EX type 5 = applied-field voltage source == type 0)
dipole-ex5-freesp-51seg.status: PH8-CHK-003: EX type 5 = voltage source (applied-field model); solves == type 0.

dipole-ex5-pulse-current-freesp-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole, 51 seg, 14.2 MHz, EX type 5 voltage source on the pulse solver path. PH8-CHK-003: type 5 is a voltage source and solves under --solver pulse (same value as type 0).
dipole-ex5-pulse-current-freesp-51seg.reference_source: fnec pulse solver EX5 current-source implementation (regression)
forbidden_warning_substrings: EX type 5 is currently treated like EX type 0
dipole-ex5-pulse-current-freesp-51seg.status: PH8-CHK-003: EX type 5 = voltage source; solves under --solver pulse.

dipole-pt-freesp-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole, free space, 51 segments, 14.2 MHz, PT card parsed with deferred runtime semantics
dipole-pt-freesp-51seg.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (regression reference for PT staged portability; PT is parsed but ignored at runtime)
expected_warning_substrings: PT card support is currently deferred
dipole-pt-freesp-51seg.status: Regression lock for PT deck portability while PT runtime semantics remain deferred.

dipole-nt-freesp-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole, 51 seg, 14.2 MHz. This deck's NT card is malformed (8 fields, expected 10), so PH8-CHK-004's stamp path warns and skips it; the dipole solves as free-space (74.23+j13.9). Well-formed NT stamping is covered by dipole-nt-tl-equiv-freesp-51seg.
dipole-nt-freesp-51seg.reference_source: fnec: malformed NT card warned + skipped; deck runs as free-space
dipole-nt-freesp-51seg.status: PH8-CHK-004: NT implemented; this malformed NT card is warned + skipped.

dipole-nt-tl-equiv-freesp-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole, 51 seg, 14.2 MHz, with a well-formed NT two-port network between segments 20 and 32 whose admittance parameters equal the equivalent of a lossless TL (Z0=50, len=2.0m). PH8-CHK-004: the NT admittance->Z stamp reproduces the equivalent TL feedpoint impedance end to end (matches the TL deck to ~1e-5 ohm), validating the stamp through the full solve.
dipole-nt-tl-equiv-freesp-51seg.reference_source: fnec NT admittance stamp; equals the equivalent TL deck feedpoint impedance
dipole-nt-tl-equiv-freesp-51seg.status: PH8-CHK-004: well-formed NT two-port stamped into Z; reproduces the equivalent TL impedance.

dipole-pt-nt-freesp-51seg.status: Phase-2 regression lock: PT still unknown-card; NT parsed with deferred-support warning.

dipole-freesp-rp-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole, free space, 51 segments, 14.2 MHz, RP theta sweep
dipole-freesp-rp-51seg.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (regression reference; RP table support)

external_reference_candidate.source: nec2c 1.3.1 on Arch Linux (deck copy with RP integer field normalized)

dipole-freesp-rp-51seg.status: Regression reference locks RP execution path and radiation-pattern table contract; nec2c external pattern samples captured for parity tracking. ExternalGain gate tightened 0.1→0.08 on 2026-04-29 (actual max |dGain|=0.068).

dipole-ground-rp-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole over PEC ground, 51 segments, 14.2 MHz, RP theta sweep 10-90 deg
dipole-ground-rp-51seg.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (regression reference; PEC image far-field)
dipole-ground-rp-51seg.status: Regression reference for PEC ground far-field (image method); captures null at theta≈60° from destructive interference and max gain at horizon. Locked 2026-04-29.

dipole-xaxis-rp-grid-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole rotated onto the x-axis, free space, 51 segments, 14.2 MHz, RP theta/phi grid
dipole-xaxis-rp-grid-51seg.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (regression reference; multi-phi RP grid support)

external_reference_candidate.source: nec2c 1.3.1 on Arch Linux (deck copy with RP integer field normalized)

dipole-xaxis-rp-grid-51seg.status: Regression reference locks multi-phi RP table support on a non-z-axis dipole; nec2c external pattern samples captured for parity tracking. ExternalGain gate tightened 0.1→0.04 on 2026-04-29 (actual max |dGain|=0.034).

dipole-freesp-gm-inplace-shifted.description: Half-wave dipole, free space, generated by applying GM in-place translation to the baseline deck
dipole-freesp-gm-inplace-shifted.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (regression reference; GM in-place translation validated against baseline free-space dipole)
dipole-freesp-gm-inplace-shifted.status: Regression reference matches dipole-freesp-51seg exactly; added to lock GM in-place translation into corpus validation

dipole-ground-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole, 10 m AGL, perfect ground, 51 segments, 14.2 MHz
dipole-ground-51seg.reference_source: fnec Hallén solver with GN=1 PEC image-method ground (regression)

external_reference_candidate.source: nec2c 1.3.1 on Arch Linux (deck copy with XQ appended)

dipole-ground-51seg.status: GN=1 PEC image-method support active; regression-gated in CI. External reference candidate captured via nec2c 1.3.1 with XQ-appended deck copy, and now CI-gated with absolute external R/X thresholds. ExternalR gate tightened 10→8 on 2026-04-29 (actual |dR|=7.12).

dipole-gn0-fresnel-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole, 10 m AGL, GN type 0 finite ground (simple Fresnel model), 51 segments, 14.2 MHz
dipole-gn0-fresnel-51seg.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver with GN=0 simple finite-ground model (regression)
forbidden_warning_substrings: GN type 0 is not yet supported; treating this deck as free-space
dipole-gn0-fresnel-51seg.status: GN=0 simple finite-ground model active. Regression-gated in CI and explicitly forbids the former deferred-ground warning contract.

dipole-gn2-deferred.description: Half-wave dipole, GN type 2 finite-conductivity, 51 segments, 14.2 MHz. Uses the scoped finite-ground runtime path (currently aligned to the simple GN0 approximation).
dipole-gn2-deferred.ground: finite conductivity GN2 (scoped runtime path; simple finite-ground approximation)
dipole-gn2-deferred.reference_source: fnec Hallén solver with GN2 scoped finite-ground path (regression)
forbidden_warning_substrings: GN type 2 is not yet supported; treating this deck as free-space
dipole-gn2-deferred.status: PAR-002 scoped runtime-ground fixture. GN2 no longer uses deferred free-space fallback; regression values are gated on the active finite-ground approximation and explicitly forbid the old deferred warning contract.

dipole-gn2-buried-unsupported.description: Buried dipole with active GN type 2 finite ground. This geometry class is currently unsupported and must fail fast with actionable diagnostics.
dipole-gn2-buried-unsupported.ground: finite conductivity GN2 buried-wire class (unsupported guardrail)
dipole-gn2-buried-unsupported.expected_hallen_error_contains: unsupported buried-wire geometry for active ground model
forbidden_warning_substrings: GN type 2 is not yet supported; treating this deck as free-space
dipole-gn2-buried-unsupported.status: PH2-CHK-002 unsupported-class guardrail contract: buried-wire active-ground requests fail fast with actionable diagnostics instead of silently solving.

dipole-gn2-near-ground-51seg.description: Low-height half-wave dipole, GN type 2 finite-conductivity ground, 51 segments, 14.2 MHz. Locks the supported above-ground near-ground class separately from buried-wire guardrails.
dipole-gn2-near-ground-51seg.reference_source: fnec Hallén solver with GN2 scoped finite-ground path on low above-ground geometry (regression)
forbidden_warning_substrings: GN type 2 is not yet supported; treating this deck as free-space
unsupported buried-wire geometry for active ground model
dipole-gn2-near-ground-51seg.status: PH2-CHK-002 supported-class contract: low above-ground GN2 near-ground geometry remains solveable, regression-gated, and explicitly forbids both deferred-ground and buried-wire guardrail text.

dipole-gn-1-null.description: Half-wave dipole, GN -1 (null ground — cancels previous GN per NEC spec §3.3), 51 segments, 14.2 MHz. Must produce free-space results with NO deferred-ground warning.
dipole-gn-1-null.reference_source: fnec Hallén solver free-space (regression; GN -1 treated as free-space per NEC spec)
forbidden_warning_substrings: GN type -1 is not yet supported
dipole-gn-1-null.status: PAR-002 GN -1 null-ground correctness fixture. GN -1 must map to FreeSpace silently; no deferred-ground warning should be emitted.

yagi-5elm-51seg.description: 5-element Yagi (1 reflector + driven + 3 directors), 14.2 MHz, 0.2-lambda element spacing
yagi-5elm-51seg.reference_source: fnec Hallén solver (regression reference; multi-wire RHS/endpoints fixed 2026-04-25); updated to free-space (GN not parsed in Phase-1 parser)
yagi-5elm-51seg.status: Reference updated after Hallen RHS fix (2026). Old reference (-18.32) was captured with incorrect code that applied source excitation to passive parasitic elements. New result (30.63+j5.02) reflects correct passive-wire handling with rhs=0 for non-EX wires. Passive Yagi elements couple only through Z-matrix. External NEC2 validation pending.

dipole-ld-loaded-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole, free space, 51 segments, 14.2 MHz, LD type 4 + LD type 1 feed loading
dipole-ld-loaded-51seg.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (Phase-2 regression reference; LD cards parsed and applied)

external_reference_candidate.source: nec2c 1.3.1 on Arch Linux (deck copy with XQ inserted before EN)

dipole-ld-loaded-51seg.status: Phase-2 regression lock: LD cards parsed and applied. fnec now applies LD type 1+4 loads; impedance reflects loaded operation. External nec2c reference not yet aligned (pending further LD model validation).

dipole-ld-series-rl-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole, free space, 51 segments, 14.2 MHz, LD type 2 series RL feed loading
dipole-ld-series-rl-51seg.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (Phase-2 regression reference; LD type 2 series-RL parsed and applied)
dipole-ld-series-rl-51seg.status: Phase-2 regression lock: LD type 2 (series RL, R=10 Ω, L=1 µH at 14.2 MHz) parsed and applied; Z_IM dominated by inductive reactance.

dipole-ld-series-rc-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole, free space, 51 segments, 14.2 MHz, LD type 3 series RC feed loading
dipole-ld-series-rc-51seg.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (Phase-2 regression reference; LD type 3 series-RC parsed and applied)
dipole-ld-series-rc-51seg.status: Phase-2 regression lock: LD type 3 (series RC, R=10 Ω, C=1 pF at 14.2 MHz) parsed and applied; Z_IM strongly capacitive (X_C ≈11.2 kΩ).

tl-two-dipoles-linked.description: Two parallel dipoles with a lossless TL link between feed segments; one driven source
tl-two-dipoles-linked.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (Phase-2 regression reference; TL card parsed and Z-stamp applied)
tl-two-dipoles-linked.status: Phase-2 regression lock: TL card parsed and lossless Z-stamp applied. Z0=50 Ω, length=0.1 m stamp shifts Z_RE from no-TL base (3.305) to 3.670. External NEC2 validation pending.

tl-two-dipoles-linked-seg0.description: Two parallel dipoles with a lossless TL link using segment=0 endpoint mapping
tl-two-dipoles-linked-seg0.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (Phase-2 regression reference; TL card with seg=0 mapping parsed and Z-stamp applied)
tl-two-dipoles-linked-seg0.status: Phase-2 regression lock: TL card with seg=0 center-mapping parsed and Z-stamp applied. Same Z-stamp as tl-two-dipoles-linked (seg=26 resolves to same position).

tl-two-dipoles-linked-nseg0.description: Two parallel dipoles with a lossless TL link using NSEG=0 single-section shorthand
tl-two-dipoles-linked-nseg0.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (Phase-2 regression reference; TL card with NSEG=0 shorthand parsed and Z-stamp applied)
tl-two-dipoles-linked-nseg0.status: Phase-2 regression lock: TL card with NSEG=0 shorthand treated as single-section; same Z-stamp as NSEG=1 case.

tl-two-dipoles-linked-seg0-even52.description: Two parallel dipoles with a lossless TL link using segment=0 endpoints on even-segment wires
tl-two-dipoles-linked-seg0-even52.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (Phase-2 regression reference; TL with seg=0 lower-center mapping on even-segment tags, Z-stamp applied)
tl-two-dipoles-linked-seg0-even52.status: Phase-2 regression lock: TL card with seg=0 lower-center mapping on even-segment (52-seg) wires; Z-stamp shifts Z_RE relative to no-TL base.

dipole-loaded.description: 14.2 MHz dipole driven at 7.1 MHz with top-hat loading loop
dipole-loaded.status: Hallen solver now supports non-collinear multi-wire topologies via per-wire local cos and junction KCL constraints. Reference: NEC2DXS500 via Wine at 13.4632 - j896.032 ohm.

dipole-loaded-noncollinear-hallen.description: 14.2 MHz dipole driven at 7.1 MHz with top-hat loading loop, using --allow-noncollinear-hallen
dipole-loaded-noncollinear-hallen.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (experimental non-collinear projection path regression lock)
dipole-loaded-noncollinear-hallen.status: Regression lock for Hallen non-collinear path on dipole-loaded.nec. --allow-noncollinear-hallen is now silently ignored (non-collinear supported by default). Result matches dipole-loaded case.

frequency-sweep-dipole.description: Half-wave dipole, frequency sweep: 10, 12, 14, 16, 18 MHz (FR step 2.0 MHz from 10.0)
frequency-sweep-dipole.status: fnec now solves all FR points and CI-gates the full sweep using Hallen regression values. External NEC2DXS500+XQ candidates are now gated with absolute external R/X thresholds. Gates tightened 15/50→14/47 on 2026-04-29 (actual max |dR|=12.34, max |dX|=45.92).

multi-source.description: Two parallel half-wave dipoles, 1 m spacing, independent 1.0 V sources at each

external_reference_candidate.source: nec2c 1.3.1 on Arch Linux (deck copy with XQ appended)

multi-source.status: Regression reference captured from fnec for both feedpoints; external candidate captured via nec2c 1.3.1 with XQ-appended deck copy and now CI-gated with absolute external R/X thresholds. Gates tightened 15/50→12/40 on 2026-04-29 (actual |dR|=10.85, |dX|=36.97).

multi-source-gr-180.description: Two parallel half-wave dipoles generated from one off-axis dipole via GR 180-degree rotation
multi-source-gr-180.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (regression reference; GR geometry expansion validated against handwritten multi-source deck)
multi-source-gr-180.status: Regression reference matches the handwritten multi-source deck exactly; added to lock GR geometry expansion into corpus validation

multi-source-gm-copy.description: Two parallel half-wave dipoles generated from one seed dipole via GM translated copy
multi-source-gm-copy.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (regression reference; GM translated-copy expansion validated against handwritten multi-source deck)
multi-source-gm-copy.status: Regression reference matches the handwritten multi-source deck exactly; added to lock GM translated-copy expansion into corpus validation

dipole-sinusoidal-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole, free space, 51 segments, 14.2 MHz — sinusoidal Galerkin basis validation
dipole-sinusoidal-51seg.status: Sinusoidal Galerkin solver (PH6-CHK-003); validated against dipole-freesp-51seg Hallen reference within 1% R, 5% X
